mapper.sql: InvoiceNo, ImpDate, ID, AmountJp, AmountRMB, CustomFee, TransFee, OtherFee, Rate, ProdCountry, MoneyType, ImpFlag, SupplierInvoiceNo, SupplierCode, ShipDate, CostDate, OptState, AdjAmount, AmountRMB_M, AmountRMB_P, GZID, SupplierInvDate, POCostDate, OwnerCode, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo. _ops_po_invoice_master
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from dbo. _ops_po_invoice_master
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo. _ops_po_invoice_master (InvoiceNo, ImpDate, ID, AmountJp, AmountRMB, CustomFee, TransFee, OtherFee, Rate, ProdCountry, MoneyType, ImpFlag, SupplierInvoiceNo, SupplierCode, ShipDate, CostDate, OptState, AdjAmount, AmountRMB_M, AmountRMB_P, GZID, SupplierInvDate, POCostDate, OwnerCode, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, rv) values (#{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{amountjp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{customfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{rate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{moneytype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{supplierinvoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{costdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{optstate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{adjamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountrmbM,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountrmbP,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supplierinvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{pocostdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ownercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rv,jdbcType=BINARY})

InvoiceNo,
ImpDate,
ID,

rv,

mapper.update:
update dbo. _ops_po_invoice_master
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ImpDate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
AmountJp = #{record.amountjp,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AmountRMB = #{record.amountrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CustomFee = #{record.customfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
OtherFee = #{record.otherfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Rate = #{record.rate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ProdCountry = #{record.prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MoneyType = #{record.moneytype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ImpFlag = #{record.impflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
SupplierInvoiceNo = #{record.supplierinvoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SupplierCode = #{record.suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ShipDate = #{record.shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CostDate = #{record.costdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OptState = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=CHAR},
AdjAmount = #{record.adjamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AmountRMB_M = #{record.amountrmbM,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AmountRMB_P = #{record.amountrmbP,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
GZID = #{record.gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SupplierInvDate = #{record.supplierinvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
POCostDate = #{record.pocostdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OwnerCode = #{record.ownercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rv = #{record.rv,jdbcType=BINARY},

update dbo. _ops_po_invoice_master set InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ImpDate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, AmountJp = #{record.amountjp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AmountRMB = #{record.amountrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CustomFee = #{record.customfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, OtherFee = #{record.otherfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Rate = #{record.rate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ProdCountry = #{record.prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MoneyType = #{record.moneytype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ImpFlag = #{record.impflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, SupplierInvoiceNo = #{record.supplierinvoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SupplierCode = #{record.suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ShipDate = #{record.shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CostDate = #{record.costdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OptState = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=CHAR}, AdjAmount = #{record.adjamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AmountRMB_M = #{record.amountrmbM,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AmountRMB_P = #{record.amountrmbP,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, GZID = #{record.gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, SupplierInvDate = #{record.supplierinvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, POCostDate = #{record.pocostdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OwnerCode = #{record.ownercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rv = #{record.rv,jdbcType=BINARY}

update dbo. _ops_po_invoice_master
ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
AmountJp = #{amountjp,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AmountRMB = #{amountrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CustomFee = #{customfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TransFee = #{transfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
OtherFee = #{otherfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Rate = #{rate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ProdCountry = #{prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MoneyType = #{moneytype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ImpFlag = #{impflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
SupplierInvoiceNo = #{supplierinvoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SupplierCode = #{suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ShipDate = #{shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CostDate = #{costdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OptState = #{optstate,jdbcType=CHAR},
AdjAmount = #{adjamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AmountRMB_M = #{amountrmbM,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AmountRMB_P = #{amountrmbP,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
GZID = #{gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SupplierInvDate = #{supplierinvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
POCostDate = #{pocostdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OwnerCode = #{ownercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rv = #{rv,jdbcType=BINARY},
where InvoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ImpDate = #{impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo. _ops_po_invoice_master set ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, AmountJp = #{amountjp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AmountRMB = #{amountrmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CustomFee = #{customfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TransFee = #{transfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, OtherFee = #{otherfee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Rate = #{rate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ProdCountry = #{prodcountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MoneyType = #{moneytype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ImpFlag = #{impflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, SupplierInvoiceNo = #{supplierinvoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SupplierCode = #{suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ShipDate = #{shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CostDate = #{costdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OptState = #{optstate,jdbcType=CHAR}, AdjAmount = #{adjamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AmountRMB_M = #{amountrmbM,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AmountRMB_P = #{amountrmbP,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, GZID = #{gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, SupplierInvDate = #{supplierinvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, POCostDate = #{pocostdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OwnerCode = #{ownercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rv = #{rv,jdbcType=BINARY} where InvoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ImpDate = #{impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
